reviews.comment:
Excente atención de las chicas de la confitería hacen unos sándwichs muy ricos completos y baratos! La atención en playa es muy buena y con poca demora
Los baños son muy limpios siempre, ideal para parar con chicos o para almorzar ya que tiene al lado un parque con árboles y bancos para sentarse un rato y pasear a mascotas o estirar las piernas camino a la costa!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the girls at the confectionery; they make delicious, filling, and inexpensive sandwiches! The service on the beach is very good and there's little wait.
The restrooms are always very clean, making it ideal for stopping with children or for lunch, as it's right next to a park with trees and benches where you can sit for a while, walk your pets, or stretch your legs on the way to the beach!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdWJLMWNREAE
